The '''RO-D-series droid''' was designed and manufactured by [[Balmorran Arms/Legends|Balmorran Arms]] to serve as both a [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] and [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] for touring musicians throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Characteristics==
A jack-of-all-trades droid, the RO-D droid could function as a labor droid to help move equipment and set up a stage for a performance and could also act as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] to repair the same equipment. It also served as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] for the performers. It cost 14800 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] new.<ref name="SGD" />

==History==
A RO-D was developed for the [[Melody Fellowship]] in response to [[RetSpan Audionics]]' [[TribBot mimic series|TribBot mimic droid]], that mimicked the voice patterns of popular Fellowship stars.
